worker_dispatch.reason: Delegation was not explicitly authorized in this session, so the plan was implemented serially in the integration worktree.

units.name: workspace inventory seam
units.summary: Moved disk inventory, size and mtime calculation, classification, safe path checks, and removal into src/workspace/inventory.ts while keeping HTTP snake_case mapping in src/http/workspace-inventory.ts.

units.name: orchestrator command cleanup
units.summary: Removed legacy write shortcuts from OrchestratorPort and Orchestrator and routed HTTP writes through executeCommand directly.

units.name: frontend runtime and settings facade cleanup
units.summary: Deleted polling, event-source, and unified settings facades; imports now target runtime-client and the feature-local settings page directly.

units.name: webhook runtime cleanup
units.summary: Made src/webhook/runtime.ts the real runtime implementation and removed the service alias file.

units.name: sqlite schema ownership split
units.summary: Kept database open/close in database.ts and moved schema bootstrap and v4-v8 migrations behind ensureSqliteSchema(...).

units.name: lifecycle-state write helpers
units.summary: Added running and retry write helpers and migrated production write paths away from direct Map set/delete/clear calls.

verification.command: pnpm exec vitest run tests/http/routes.test.ts tests/http/api-contracts.test.ts tests/http/load.test.ts tests/orchestrator/restart-recovery.integration.test.ts tests/http/model-handler.integration.test.ts
verification.note: Vitest selected 2 matching files in this configuration and reported 45 passing tests.
Vite emitted existing large-chunk warnings only.
